expanded_element.title: How Does Crystal Deodorant Work and Does It Have Any Side Effects?

items.title: What is the Himalayan pink salt lawsuit?
Is Himalayan salt good for armpits?

expanded_element.title: Discover the Natural Deodorizing Powers of Himalayan Salt
expanded_element.description: But Himalayan salt is more than just a deodorant. It's also a natural exfoliant that helps remove dead skin cells and unclog pores, allowing the skin to breathe and reducing the likelihood of developing ingrown hairs. This can help keep the underarms clean and free of odor-causing bacteria.
